archimate:Grouping.name: Semantic Functional content
archimate:Grouping.documentation:
Definition: Semantic Functional Content ABB is a Grouping that refers to the procedures and mechanims to structure and organise the information to convey meaning and functionality.
Source: Inspired in "Semantic Content" article
Source reference: https://philpapers.org/rec/STOSC-2
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/SemanticFunctionalContentGrouping
eira:ID: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/SemanticFunctionalContentGrouping
ABB name: eira:SemanticFunctionalContentGrouping
Definition: Semantic Functional Content ABB is a Grouping that enables the procedures and rules to structure and organise the information to convey meaning and functionality.
Source: Inspired in "Semantic Content" article
Source reference: https://philpapers.org/rec/STOSC-2
LOST view: Semantic view
Viewpoint: Highlevel viewpoint
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/SemanticFunctionalContentGrouping
ABB name: eira:SemanticFunctionalContentGrouping
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/SemanticFunctionalContentGrouping
Interoperability Layer: Semantic

properties.value: Semantic Functional Content ABB is a Grouping that enables the procedures and rules to structure and organise the information to convey meaning and functionality.
Semantic Functional Content ABB is a Grouping that enables the procedures and rules to structure and organise the information to convey meaning and functionality.
